docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBERTI, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL DBA JUST WINDOW CLEANING AND MAINTENANCE SERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
